name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165°C).
2. Grease a 9x13 inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the sugars, butter, and oil.
4. Add eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla; mix well.
5. Sift together flour, cocoa, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
6. Alternately add these dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
7. Stir in shredded zucchini.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
9. Bake for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Let cool before turning out onto a wire rack.
